_fixture: WF02-F2 — payment lands but no dunning sequence existed; silent skip
_purpose: QBO webhook fires for an invoice that was paid but never had a dunning sequence run against it (paid before any reminder fired). WF02 should: pass IF Balance Zero, hit the UPDATE which finds zero ACTIVE rows, Aggregate emits rows_resolved=0, IF: Any Rows Resolved fires false, iteration loops back to Split In Batches with no Slack noise.
_preTestSetup: 1. In QBO sandbox: pick a paid invoice that has never appeared in ar_audit_log. Cool Cars Invoice 1004 ($0 balance, no dunning history) is the canonical candidate — confirm by querying:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ar_audit_log WHERE invoice_id='1004';
Should return 0. If not 0, pick a different invoice or DELETE the rows (only possible if the append-only trigger lets you — it does not in production, so use a different invoice).
2. No Supabase setup required for this fixture — the absence of rows IS the test condition.

_expectedBehaviour.node9_slackMessage: <not fired — silent skip per Q4 decision>
